title: QING's Create Modpack
body:
<details>
<summary>English</summary>

## QING's Create Modpack

As is known to all,Create Mod is a very popular,interesting and challenging mod.This modpack is for Create Mod lovers.

### 🔥 Featrues

- Here's a brief overview of the features:

    - Good Optimization:Added some optimized mods in modpack to improve performance.

    - Decoration mod:Decorate your super factory.

    - More useful features

### 📦 Mods

 - Some mods in this modpack:

    - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/spdium) | [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium)

    - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

    - [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)

    - [Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f3)

    - And more ......

### ❓ Other information

- If you find any problems, please let me know.

    - [Discord](https://discord.gg/ubKFTZug)

    - E-mail:afb3u8633@163.com
    - My other modpacks:[QING’s Survival Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qings_survival_modpack)

</details>

<details>
<summary>简体中文</summary>

## QING的Create模组包

众所周知，Create(机械动力）是一个受欢迎的，有趣的且具有挑战性的科技模组。这个模组包为Create爱好者制作。

### 🔥 特点

- 以下是这个模组包的特点

    - 极好的性能优化:在模组包中增加了一些性能优化类模组来提升你的游戏性能，即使是低配电脑也能流畅运行

    - 装饰模组:用来装饰你的超级工厂!

    - 更多有趣的功能（例如在游戏内下载光影，资源包，数据包等）

### 📦 模组

 - 这个模组包中的一些模组:

    - [[钠]-Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/spdium) | [[铷]-Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium)

    - [[机械动力]-Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

    - [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)

    - [[更好的F3]-Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f3)

    - 还有更多 ......

### ❓ 其他信息

- 如果你发现了一些问题，请告诉我:

    - [加入我的Discord服务器](https://discord.gg/ubKFTZug)

    - E-mail:afb3u8633@163.com
    - 我的其他整合包：[QING’s Survival Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qings_survival_modpack)



</details>
